reviews.review_title: Is good but I wish there was more to it
reviews.review_description: I like this game but when I played it I felt like it was so short and I been waiting for another update for it

reviews.review_title: A sweet story that stays with you!
reviews.review_description:
Kitten Mormitten isn’t just a game - it’s a small magical adventure with a warm, cozy story. It feels like a soft childhood dream, calm and full of heart.

It’s not about action or puzzles - it’s about emotions, comfort, and a little bit of wonder.

Make sure to watch the short animated film too - it makes the whole experience even more special.
